When you have slain all of your enemies,

Nature respects the strong

the plan won't work! Where's Arn?! I have to tell him!"

uniques.flavourText: Fragile, explosive, and punishing.

uniques.name: Springleaf
implicits: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicits: Regenerate 100 Life per Second while on Low Life
Regenerate (3-6)% of Life per second while on Low Life
uniques.flavourText: From death springs life.

uniques.name: Svalinn
explicits: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
uniques.flavourText:
The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

uniques.name: The Anticipation
uniques.flavourText:
We are within her reach,
and when the time is right,
she will reach into us.

uniques.name: The Deep One's Hide
explicits: Adds 4 to 8 Physical Damage to Attacks
Adds (4-12) to (8-15) Cold Damage to Attacks
Curse Enemies with Level 5 Vulnerability on Block
Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Block, with 20% increased Effect
Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Block
uniques.flavourText:
The thicker the shell,
the greater the beast that hunts it.

uniques.name: The Eternal Apple
explicits: Trigger a Socketed Warcry Skill on losing Endurance Charges, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
Trigger a Socketed Warcry Skill when you lose Endurance Charges
You lose all Endurance Charges on reaching maximum Endurance Charges
uniques.flavourText:
The empire is both the tree and the fruit.
It provides safe harbour as ideas grow within,
and when the time is right, the apple is picked. 
The idea, and our ideals, take root.

uniques.name: The Flawed Refuge
implicits: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicits: You take 100% of Elemental Damage from Blocked Hits
40% of Elemental Damage from Hits taken as Physical Damage
uniques.flavourText:
The Wildwood was a gift, meant as a haven
against the Winter of the World.

uniques.name: The Ghastly Theatre
explicits: +2 to Level of Socketed Support Gems
Triggers Level 20 Physical Aegis when Equipped
Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
(8-15)% increased Attack and Cast Speed while Physical Aegis is depleted
(50-70)% increased Critical Strike Chance while Physical Aegis is depleted
Nearby Enemies are Blinded while Physical Aegis is not depleted
uniques.flavourText:
Never let the audience know your true form. Misdirect them,
beguile them. Strike when they least expect it.

uniques.name: The Oak

explicits: Regenerate (3-6)% of Life per second while on Low Life
uniques.flavourText: Even the mightiest tree was once just a sapling.

uniques.name: The Oppressor
implicits: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicits: -10% to amount of Suppressed Spell Damage Prevented
You take 20% of Damage from Blocked Hits
uniques.flavourText: Every clash leaves one more scar.

uniques.name: The Scales of Justice
explicits: (3-4) to (7-8) added Fire Damage per 100 of Maximum Life or Maximum Mana, whichever is lower
Unaffected by Ignite or Shock if Maximum Life and Maximum Mana are within 500
uniques.flavourText:
You shall be weighed and measured. You shall be judged...
and perhaps you shall be found worthy.

uniques.name: The Squire
implicits: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicits: +(5-8)% to Quality of Socketed Support Gems
Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from your Main Hand
uniques.flavourText:
Judge not the weak, for
they empower the strong.

uniques.name: The Surrender
uniques.flavourText:
Our hearts cry out
but are silenced by our flesh
and so we give up our flesh.

uniques.name: Thirst for Horrors
explicits: +(1-3) to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
(10-100)% Chance to Cause Monster to Flee on Block
1% of Damage Leeched as Life against Cursed Enemies
Curse Skills have 100% increased Skill Effect Duration
uniques.flavourText: What goes out must come in.

uniques.name: Thousand Teeth Temu
explicits: 0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life
Reflects (1-1000) to (1000-10000) Physical Damage to Attackers on Block
10% of Damage you Reflect to Enemies when Hit is gained as Life
10% of Damage you Reflect to Enemies when Hit is leeched as Life
uniques.flavourText:
Crimson burn'd the star of sadness,
All was woe that seem'd but gladness.

uniques.name: Titucius' Span
explicits: -(80-10) Physical Damage taken from Projectile Attacks
+25% Chance to Block Projectile Attack Damage
uniques.flavourText:
A mighty bulwark, curved and strong
A dauntless wall, against the throng
All lance and arrow, knocked aside
For rout of foe, for turn of tide.

uniques.name: Trolltimber Spire
explicits: 1% of Damage Leeched as Life for Skills used by Totems
15% increased Area of Effect for Skills used by Totems
0.5% of Damage dealt by your Totems is Leeched to you as Life
You and your Totems Regenerate 0.5% of Life per second for each Summoned Totem
uniques.flavourText:
The problem with working fresh trolltimber:
by the time you've carved out one end, 
the other has sprouted fresh roots!

uniques.name: Tukohama's Fortress
explicits: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems
uniques.flavourText:
Tukohama couldn't lose a fight in his fortress,
So he carried his fortress to the fight.

uniques.name: Unyielding Flame
explicits: Trigger Commandment of Inferno on Critical Strike
(8-12)% increased Attack Speed if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
(8-12)% increased Cast Speed if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently
uniques.flavourText:
An Emperor must conquer his own darkness
before he can act as a beacon of light.

uniques.name: Victario's Charity
implicits: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicits: (10-20)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
10% chance to grant a Power Charge to nearby Allies on Kill
5% chance to grant a Frenzy Charge to nearby Allies on Hit
uniques.flavourText: A man's life is the greatest gift he can give.

uniques.name: Vix Lunaris
explicits: Triggers Level 20 Cold Aegis when Equipped
uniques.flavourText:
Silent, silent night,
Quench the holy light.

uniques.name: Wheel of the Stormsail
explicits: 100% increased Duration of Curses on you
Curse Skills have (25-100)% increased Skill Effect Duration
uniques.flavourText: Doomed to plunder forever.

uniques.name: Zeel's Amplifier
implicits: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicits: 1% increased Area of Effect per Enemy killed recently, up to 50%
You have Zealot's Oath if you haven't been hit recently
uniques.flavourText:
"Great minds wish to reveal all the secrets of time and space.
But it does not matter. Creation, the act of Matter Metamorphosis, 
is the only secret worth discovering." 
- Zeel, Vaal Tinkerer
